# Skills

This folder contains **skill definitions** — reusable knowledge units that describe how specific parts of Grimoires work or how common tasks should be performed.

## Purpose

Skill files capture repeatable patterns, step-by-step guides, and best practices that are specific to the Grimoires codebase. GitHub Copilot and contributors can reference these files to produce consistent, well-integrated code.

## How to Use

- When you identify a repeatable workflow or architectural pattern in this codebase, add a new Markdown file here.
- Name files descriptively using kebab-case (e.g., `add-new-module.md`, `register-command.md`).
- Each skill file should include a short description, step-by-step instructions, and a concise code example where applicable.

## Conventions

| Field | Convention |
|---|---|
| File format | Markdown (`.md`) |
| Naming | `kebab-case-description.md` |
| Content | Description → Steps → Code example |
